title: Useful Online Resources for Mork Borg
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k4GBTLOy9aE

Daniel (@dungeondive) showcases practical online tools for solo and group Mork Borg gameplay, including an AC conversion table, random dungeon generators, encounter generators, and the Tablemanger website packed with random tables for lost souls, monsters, plots, powers, and treasures. He also demonstrates how the free dungeon generator paired with specialized encounter tables creates efficient binder-ready resources perfect for quick dungeon preparation.

----

What's your favorite online resource for prepping Mork Borg sessions, and how do you organize your collection of random tables?
